title: Steeves Bujold becomes President of the Canadian Bar Association
content:
## Steeves Bujold becomes President of the Canadian Bar Association
Montreal, September 1, 2022 – McCarthy Tétrault is proud to announce that Steeves Bujold, partner and leader of the Litigation Group for the Quebec region, has become President of the Canadian Bar Association (CBA).
Mr. Bujold maintains a diversified litigation practice and is known as an industry leader in health law, medical and pharmaceutical liability and professional negligence. He is a member of McCarthy Tétrault’s Inclusion Now Committee and is Chair of the firm’s Pride Action Group. In this role, he leads the firm’s national diversity and inclusion initiatives for the LGBTQ2S+ community.
“The arrival of Steeves as CBA’s President is a testament to both his strong inclusive leadership skills and deep dedication to the legal profession. I know that Steeves' commitment and innovativeness will contribute to the advancement of our profession and the CBA’s priorities,” said Dave Leonard, CEO at McCarthy Tétrault.
Steeves has been an active member of the CBA since 2001 and a member of the CBA Board of Directors since September 2019. He chaired the CBA CEO Selection Committee, the Policy Committee, the Governance & Equality Committee and the Equality Subcommittee.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
